session.user: Run `erk docs sync` to verify it's clean (no more changes needed), then run `prettier --check docs/learned/` to verify markdown formatting. Report results.
session.assistant: I'll run both commands to verify the documentation is clean and properly formatted.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Sync erk documentation and report any changes
